summary: Tested rejection reason feature for Tomich Gestão de Mídia. All backend API tests passed (8/8). Frontend UI tests all passed - modal opens on reject click, reason field works correctly, submit button disabled when empty, rejection reasons display correctly in Rejected tab.

issues: Minor: React DevTools warning about missing DialogContent description - cosmetic only

passed_tests: BACKEND: Vote against without reason returns 400 error
BACKEND: Vote against with reason returns 200 and saves rejection_reasons
BACKEND: Vote for (approval) does NOT require reason
BACKEND: Vote against with empty reason returns 400
BACKEND: Vote against with whitespace-only reason returns 400
BACKEND: Rejection reasons appear in GET /approvals response
BACKEND: Rejection reason has required fields (user_id, user_name, reason, created_at)
BACKEND: Multiple users can reject same approval with different reasons
FRONTEND: Modal has title 'Motivo da Rejeição'
FRONTEND: Modal has textarea for entering reason
FRONTEND: 'Confirmar Rejeição' button disabled when reason is empty
FRONTEND: Button enabled after typing reason
FRONTEND: Modal closes after successful rejection
FRONTEND: Success toast appears after rejection
FRONTEND: Rejected tab shows '1 motivo de rejeição' button on cards
FRONTEND: Clicking motivo button expands to show voter name, date/time, and reason
FRONTEND: Clicking 'Aprovar' does NOT open rejection modal
seed_data_creation: Created test approvals during testing for rejection reason flow validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rejection reason feature fully tested and working. When clicking 'Rejeitar', modal opens with required reason field. API correctly validates that 'against' votes require non-empty reason. Rejection reasons display correctly in the Rejected tab with collapsible view showing voter name, timestamp, and reason text.

feature_test_summary.rejection_modal_opens_on_click: PASS - Modal titled 'Motivo da Rejeição' opens when clicking 'Rejeitar'
feature_test_summary.modal_has_textarea: PASS - Textarea with placeholder for rejection reason is present
feature_test_summary.submit_disabled_when_empty: PASS - 'Confirmar Rejeição' button disabled until reason is typed
feature_test_summary.api_400_without_reason: PASS - API returns 400 if voting against without reason
feature_test_summary.api_200_with_reason: PASS - API accepts vote against with reason and saves to rejection_reasons
feature_test_summary.rejection_reasons_display: PASS - Cards in Rejected tab show '1 motivo de rejeição' button
feature_test_summary.expanded_shows_details: PASS - Expanded view shows voter name, date/time, and reason text
feature_test_summary.approval_no_reason_required: PASS - Clicking 'Aprovar' votes immediately without modal
